message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam class {
  BackgroundColor White
  BorderColor Black
  ArrowColor Black
}

class CreateClinicalAnalysisLaboratoryUI {
    <<C>>
}

class CreateClinicalController {
    <<C>>
    + createClinical(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes) : void
    + saveClinical() : void
}

class TestTypeMapper {
    <<C>>
    + List<TestTypeDTO> toDTO(List<TestType> list) : List<TestTypeDTO>
    + TestTypeDTO toDTO(TestType obj) : TestTypeDTO
}

class TestTypeDTO {
    - type : String
    - collectingMethods : String
    + TestTypeDTO(type, collectingMethods) : void
}

class TestTypeStore {
    <<C>>
    + createTestType(type, collectingMethods) : void
    + validateTestType(tt) : boolean
    + saveTestType(tt) : void
    + addTestType(tt) : void
    + getTestType(tt) : TestType
}

class Administrator {
    <<C>>
    + createClinical(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes) : Clinical
    + saveClinical(clinical) : void
    - validate(clinical) : boolean
}

class Clinical {
    <<C>>
    - idLaboratory : String
    - name : String
    - address : String
    - phoneNumber : String
    - tin : String
    - testTypes : String[]
    + Client(idLaboratory, name, address, phoneNumber, tin, testTypes) : void
}

class Employee {
    <<C>>
    - idEmployee : String
    - name : String
    - function : String
    - phoneNumber : String
    - email : String
    - address : String
    - soc : String
}

class TestType {
    <<C>>
    - type : String
    - collectingMethods : String
    + getTestType() : TestType
}

class Platform {
    <<C>>
    + getClinicals() : List<Clinical>
    + addClinical(clinical) : void
}

class ClinicalStore {
    <<C>>
    + getClinicals() : List<Clinical>
    + addClinicals() : void
}

CreateClinicalAnalysisLaboratoryUI ..> CreateClinicalController : uses
CreateClinicalController ..> TestTypeMapper : uses
CreateClinicalController ..> TestTypeDTO : uses
CreateClinicalController ..> TestTypeStore : uses
CreateClinicalController ..> Administrator : uses
Administrator "1" -- "*" Clinical : create
Administrator "1" -- "1" Employee : is
Clinical "1" -- "*" TestType : conducts
Employee "1" -- "*" Platform : uses
Platform ..> ClinicalStore : uses

@enduml
```
